title: Surgeon Vacancy at BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited!
